canonical_definition: A multilingual benchmark that evaluates figurative language usage in multi-turn dialogue across English, Korean, and Chinese, using a cloze-style multiple-choice format to assess pragmatic appropriateness.
papers: MemeIntel: Explainable Detection of Propagandistic and Hateful Memes
